description: Shared prefab classification rules — apply to ALL terrains on export. Rules MUST emit structured gameplay, spatial, and render.iconKey for Eden AI + glyphs. See t090_eden_ai_world_object_schema.md and t090_world_object_glyphs.md.

ai.summary: Location composition prefab (whole-POI grouping entity); zero extents; children export as their own rows — never render.
Attached building part (entry, door, ladder, graffiti); belongs to a parent structure — not a standalone footprint.
Road/tourist/warning signage; no cover; concealment only.
Bridge railing segment; low hard cover along a bridge deck.
Road crash barrier; low hard cover; blocks vehicles.
Freestanding wall/fence segment (pole, net, wood, stone, brick, concrete, pipe); linear hard cover.
Pavement/sidewalk piece; flat surface, no cover.
Railway track segment; ground-level; minor vehicle obstacle.
Power pylon/pole; tall thin utility; negligible cover.
Lamp post / floodlight mast / runway light; light source at night.
Piping/culvert/drainage works; low utility structure.
Military training obstacle (bridge element of obstacle course); climbable hard cover.
Bridge span/pillar; crossable hard structure over water or gap; chokepoint.
Lighthouse; tall coastal landmark tower; excellent observation point.
Pier/dock/naval structure; walkable hard platform over water.
Cemetery/calvary monument (gravestones, crosses); low stone cover.
Castle/fortress wall, tower or ruin section; historic stone landmark; hard cover.
Rubble pile from a ruined house; low scramble cover, not a structure footprint.
Ruined structure shell (walls, corners, chimney); broken hard cover; partially enterable.
Civic building (church, chapel, fire station); prominent hard structure.
Garbage container; small street furniture; low cover.
Shipping/storage container; solid hard cover block; common at industrial and military sites.
Shed/outbuilding (garden, boat, bus, fisherman, metal); small enterable structure.
Garage; small vehicle structure; enterable hard cover.
Tent (camp/military); concealment only — no hard cover.
Tower structure (guard/deer stand/control/transmitter/water); elevated observation position.
Guard house/box; small military checkpoint structure.
Street/garden furniture (bench, board, clothesline, garden bed); minimal low cover.
Anthill mound; low soft mound; prone concealment.
Industrial installation (fuel tank, silo, factory hall, crane, transformer/weight/water station).
Fuel station building/canopy; roadside commercial structure.
Fuel pallet/barrel/crane spreader; small industrial prop; low cover.
Recreation furniture (playground, stadium fittings); low props.
Conifer tree; static vegetation; soft cover to ~4 m standing.
Deciduous tree; static vegetation; soft cover.
Paved road segment; no cover; vehicle route.
Residential building; hard cover; blocks movement and LOS.
Coastal palm tree; static vegetation; light soft cover.
Dead or burned tree; bare trunk; minimal soft cover.
Low shrub; prone/crouch concealment only; no ballistic protection.
Grass patch; prone concealment only; no protection.
Cliff or rock face prop; hard cover; blocks movement and LOS.
Standalone rock; hard cover; blocks movement and LOS.
Street lamp; tall thin pole; night light source; no real cover.
Radio antenna mast; tall landmark; climbable via service ladder.
Pier structure over water; walkable; no cover.
Barrier or roadblock; hard crouch/prone cover; blocks vehicles.
Sign on thin post; decoration; no cover or obstacle.
Military fortification obstacle (hedgehog, dragon teeth, trench segment); hard low cover; blocks vehicles.
Concrete bunker; heavy hard cover; enterable firing positions.
Military structure (barracks, guardhouse, base building); hard cover; enterable.
Agricultural building (barn, stable, granary); hard cover; large open interior.
Ruined structure; partial hard cover; broken walls and openings.
Cultural or civic structure (church, chapel, monument hall); hard cover; landmark.
Service building (fire station, municipal office, hotel); hard cover; enterable.
Industrial tower (light tower, water tower); tall thin landmark; minimal cover.
Industrial building (factory hall, warehouse, plant); hard cover; large footprint.
Commercial building (shop, booth, kiosk); hard cover; street-facing entrances.
Aircraft hangar; very large open hard-cover structure at an airfield.
Airfield control tower; tall landmark; overwatch position.
Airfield runway segment; wide flat surface; aircraft operations.
Forest-floor tree debris (stump, fallen trunk, branch); low soft cover prone only.
Conifer tree (spruce/pine); static vegetation; soft cover to ~4 m standing.
Deciduous tree (birch/hornbeam/fruit/alder/willow/poplar/lime); static vegetation; soft cover.
Granite rock or rock cluster; hard cover; blocks movement and LOS.
Unrecognized standalone structure; generic hard building footprint (needs a specific rule).
Unclassified static map prop; needs classification rule.
